image_label: test6 - Room Planner composite plan (Catalan labels), stepped non-rectangular footprint

scale_origin.note: local origin = SW outer corner of the bounding box. x east, y north. Units METERS. STEPPED NON-RECTANGULAR composite of offset rooms (overall left height 15,00). Exact inter-block offsets are LOW confidence: room areas do not equal WxH (Room Planner irregular shapes), and the blocks abut at offsets that are hard to reconstruct from a single plan. Walls below approximate each room's bounding box; treat absolute coordinates as schematic.

strokes.note: approximate outer perimeter of the stepped composite (CCW). Captures the L/step transitions between the left column, the top block, the right blocks, and the bottom RECEPCIO. LOW confidence on every step vertex — this is the non-rectangular gap.
left column: HABITACIO 42.7 (above, 6.00 tall) / HABITACIO 49.8 (below, 7.00 tall) divide. Healed door opening (arc) at x~=1.0.
vertical spine separating left column from center/right blocks. x=7.11.
south wall of top-center block (HABITACIO 31.8; 6.80 x 4.68). Healed door opening (arc) at x~=8.0.
wall between top-center block (31.8) and right-upper block (22.6; 3.63 x 4.92).
south wall of right-upper block (22.6) / north wall of right-mid block (31.7). Healed door opening at x~=11.5.
north wall of bottom RECEPCIO (104) / south of right-mid block (31.7, 5.18 tall). Healed door opening at x~=9.0 (RECEPCIO entry).
vertical wall bounding right-mid block (31.7) on its west; 8,18 dim. MEDIUM/LOW conf.
RECEPCIO south window/opening (dashed gap on bottom wall). z unknown. Parent S1 (bottom run). LOW conf on span.

dimensions.note: duplicate 4.68 dim near top block right edge (m)

ocr_texts.note: top-center room ('N' = placeholder room name under HABITACIO)

unknowns_noted: STEPPED NON-RECTANGULAR composite: the headline difficulty. Inter-block offsets reconstructed approximately; every step vertex is LOW confidence. Areas != WxH (irregular Room Planner shapes), so cannot back-solve offsets cleanly
the perimeter polyline S1 is a best-effort stitch of the visible step transitions; phase2 should treat block adjacencies as uncertain
uncaptured_visual_elements: WATERMARK ignored: 'ROOM PLANNER / roomplannerapp.com' logo+text bottom-right -> not structure, not traced
no furniture in this drawing (schematic, empty rooms)
the 'N' under each room name is a placeholder room-name token -> kept inside the room ocr_texts rather than dropped
HEALED DOORS (~4): left-column divide (S2 x~=1.0); top-center block entry (S4 x~=8.0); right-upper/mid divide (S6 x~=11.5); RECEPCIO entry (S7 x~=9.0)
WINDOWS: bottom RECEPCIO south wall shows dashed window openings (S20); other walls schematic with no clear glazing

CAPABILITY FLAG: this stepped composite is beyond the current rectangular-footprint comfort zone (plan.md B5/B6 non-rectangular + global-coord work). Phase1 captured what it could; absolute geometry is schematic
